personal.name: Ahmed Saleh
personal.role: Backend & Full-Stack Engineer focused on APIs, systems, and reliability
personal.subtitle: Shipping production software with scalable APIs and maintainable architecture.

projects.title: Paradise Sharm Tours
highlights: Designed, built, and deployed a production tour platform with Docker Compose on a VPS with automated SSL/TLS
Implemented Prometheus/Grafana monitoring and k6 load testing (220 concurrent VUs, 2-hour soak tests)
Automated daily MongoDB backups with 7-day retention and one-command redeployment
Achieved 91 Performance, 100 Accessibility, and 92 Best Practices on Lighthouse

projects.title: Cairo Transportation Network
highlights: Engineered a smart-city routing platform processing 35 locations and 74 roads across Greater Cairo using A* emergency routing (39% faster than Dijkstra, 40% fewer node expansions) and 0/1 Knapsack DP for maintenance budget optimization (42% improvement over greedy, serving 78.5% transit demand with 50 vehicles)

Built a modular monolith ASP.NET Core REST API with IMemoryCache (<1ms graph retrieval), Next.js interactive Leaflet map, and automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions, achieving <2ms average algorithm response time

projects.title: E-commerce API
highlights: Built a production-ready ecommerce REST API with 8+ modules (products, orders, cart, reviews, coupons) featuring Stripe payment integration with webhook handling and email verification flows

Implemented BaseController pattern for DRY CRUD operations, JWT authentication with MFA-protected account deletion, and hardened security (Helmet, NoSQL injection protection, HPP, rate limiting, input sanitization)

bullets: Architected and deployed paradisesharm.com, a multi-language (EN/AR/RU/DE/IT) tour booking platform using Next.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and Traefik with automated SSL/TLS, serving 174 MAU across 6 countries (US, EG, IT, IE, SE, UK)
Built observability stack with Prometheus, Grafana, and k6 stress testing (up to 220 concurrent VUs, 2-hour soak tests) enabling proactive performance regression detection before deployment
Integrated Google Analytics, PostHog, and Plerdy across the platform, tracking behavioral funnels for 651 total users and surfacing conversion drop-off insights that informed two UX iterations
Optimized frontend to achieve 91 Performance, 100 Accessibility, and 92 Best Practices Lighthouse scores with 0.9s FCP and 0 cumulative layout shift
Hardened application security with RBAC, JWT refresh token rotation, and rate limiting; implemented automated daily MongoDB backups with 7-day retention policy

Architecting and developing a full-stack competitive programming platform for a 600-member ICPC community using Next.js and Node.js, featuring problem archives, live contests with real-time leaderboards, and user rating profiles
Leading technical direction for a community of 50+ competitive programmers
Supporting competitive programming practice, algorithm discussion, and technical peer help for students in a 600-member ICPC community

principles.title: Design Contracts First
principles.description: Define data models and error contracts before writing implementation code.
